name: First Alert Chili
recipeInstructions:
NOTES: SMALL BEEF CHUNKS CAN BE USED INSTEAD OF GROUND BEEF. BLEND TOMATOES IN A BLENDER WITH LIQUID UNTIL SMOOTH. PINTO BEANS CAN BE USED INSTEAD OF KIDNEY BEANS. USE BOTTLES HOT SAUCE TO TASTE.
1. In a large skillet, heat 1/8 cup olive oil over medium-high heat and cook the onions, red pepper, garlic, and celery for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. In a large, heavy pot, heat the remaining 1/8 cup of oil and brown the meat, stirring to break up lumps and produce a smooth, uniform mixture.
3. Stir in the onion mixture into the meat mixture.
4. Add oregano, red pepper, cumin, paprika, chili powder, celery seeds, salt, pepper, tomatoes with liquid, and beer or ginger ale. Blend well.
5. Simmer for 1 hour uncovered, stirring occasionally to prevent the mixture from sticking to the bottom and scorching.
6. Add kidney beans and their liquid, blend, and simmer for an additional 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Taste for seasoning and add hot sauce if desired.
